body:
The plan is to DoorDash as much as possible before the winter storm hits tonight. So probably no fic today. But if my muse will be a good girl and share enough stories with me, perhaps I will get two up tomorrow. Or with me not leaving the house, mebbe if she’s really good, I can get a bit of ahead and get a few days worth of fiction scheduled.

All of this assumes that power stays on. If not, well maybe you’ll get some updates from my phone. (And you’ll probably see some reblogs and comments today, those are easier to do during downtime.)

I know I missed the posting I promised yesterday. I was ready to go and my plan was to cuddle my fiancée a bit and then get a photo for you all…unfortunately I fell asleep. I will have the post today or tomorrow if the weather cooperates, otherwise it will most likely be on Monday. But on the upside, if they get delayed, it gives ya’ll more time to get up to 100 followers to get to the better posts. ;)

I hope you have a wonderful weekend cuties and I’ll be around, just a little quieter than usual!
